name: Classic Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, flour, and cocoa powder.
In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat, then add water and oil. Bring to a boil, then pour the liquid mixture over the dry ingredients in the bowl. Stir until well combined.
Add eggs, buttermilk, baking soda, and almond extract to the mixture. Blend thoroughly until smooth.
Pour the batter into a rectangular baking pan lined with parchment paper or greased foil.
Microwave for 10-12 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove the cake from the microwave and let it cool on a wire rack for about 5-10 minutes before frosting.
